_doc: Round-7 F67 contract manifest. Each entry pins a config.json key to the tooling files that consume it. The consumer file's default value (extracted via the regex `pattern`, capture group 1) must match config.json's value when the operator sets the key explicitly. Validate-ConfigToolingDrift.ps1 enforces. Add a check entry per (config_key, consumer_file) pair when shipping a new tooling default that mirrors a config option.

checks.detail: Stale-draft-PR cap (hours). Config value must match the in-file default in Validate-StaleStateDetection.ps1 when the operator sets it explicitly.
